docs.title: What is Andromeda
docs.text: Andromeda is a platform for managing an online store, featuring a Django backend and a React frontend. The project supports product management, orders, cart, users, and delivery.

docs.title: Select your section
docs.text:
• For buyers →

    How to place orders, purchase and track delivery

  • For sellers →

    Products and orders management, analytics

docs.title: Account
docs.text:
Here you can find information on managing your profile and accessing your account

Log In Signing in to your account and login issues solving Account Settings Update your personal information, change password, manage addresses and payment methods Problems with Access Getting support with access issues

docs.title: Log In
docs.text:
Logging in allows you to:

  • Add products to the cart and favorites;
  • Change account information: username, phone number, delivery address;
  • View your previous orders.
Login by phone number

  1. If you don't see a sidebar with a field for entering a phone number, find the login icon in the upper-right corner and click on it:

  2. Enter the phone number and click the "Get code" button.
  3. Enter the SMS code you received and click the "Send" button.

After successful verification, you will be logged in automatically.

Possible errors and ways to solve them Error Solution Invalid phone number Make sure that you entered the correct number or try another one. Landline numbers do not work. Account deactivated If a restore button appears, click it. Otherwise, create a new account with another phone number. SMS code not received Wait 60 seconds, ensure you have a stable signal, or click "Resend code". You have a maximum of 5 attempts per day. Invalid SMS code Check current code for typos or request a new one. Codes expire in 5 minutes. Too many attempts Try again in 24 hours. Sidebar does not appear Refresh the page, clear cache, or click the login icon manually.
